prompt:
Goal: Create a fresh summer editorial portrait poster of 高圆圆, with a clean blue-sky aesthetic and minimalist magazine typography.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, soft pale blue sky background, bright natural daylight, high-key exposure, airy negative space. Use a delicate cyan and white color palette with subtle film grain.

Subject details: A graceful young Chinese woman photographed from the chest up, positioned in the lower half of the frame and slightly off center. She has long flowing black hair, fair skin, and wears a loose semi-sheer white blouse with rolled sleeves. Her arms are raised above her head, both hands open and relaxed as if shading her eyes from the sun. Her face is intentionally simplified/softly obscured with a smooth neutral skin-tone blur, while the pose, hair, neck, ears, hands, and clothing remain photorealistic. Mood is calm, elegant, refreshing, and sunlit.

Layout: Large handwritten blue Chinese calligraphy spans the upper center, reading 高圆圆, with a long sweeping underline stroke extending diagonally across the sky. The portrait occupies the bottom half, leaving generous sky space above.

Visible text elements: Include exactly 7 discrete text/decorative groups: 1) top-left small stacked English text: “SUMMER”, “MORNING”, “06 / 17”; 2) a small blue dot under the date; 3) left-side vertical Chinese sentence: “晴朗的日子，空气都是甜的”; 4) left-side vertical four-dot ellipsis near the lower-left-middle; 5) top-right vertical English quote: “The brightness of day leaves a soft mark on everything.” followed by “////”; 6) bottom-left tiny vertical location labels: “BEIJING”, “CHINA” with a small blue dot; 7) bottom-right tiny vertical name/date label: “GAO YUANYUAN” and “2024”.

Visual style: Photorealistic fashion portrait mixed with Japanese/Chinese minimalist magazine design, clean typography, thin letterspacing, very small black and blue text, elegant handwritten calligraphy, soft lens bloom, gentle backlight, clear summer morning atmosphere.

Constraints: Keep the design uncluttered, no extra people, no buildings, no props, no watermark, no harsh shadows, no saturated colors. Preserve the square poster layout and the calm sky-blue freshness.
